## 1. TASK
Task 7 of 11: Implement the chain-aware GOAT provider with tiered plugin loading and per-call chain dispatch.

Working directory: `/Users/ignacioblitzer/Develop/defizoo/web3agent`

## 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME

## 4. MUST DO

### Read existing files first

### src/goat/plugins.ts
Tiered plugin loading:

```typescript
import { erc20, USDC, USDT, WETH, DAI } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-erc20";
import { erc721 } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-erc721";
import { ens } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-ens";
import { dexScreener } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-dexscreener";
import { coingecko } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-coingecko";
import { uniswap } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-uniswap";
import { balancer } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-balancer";
import { zeroEx } from "@goat-sdk/plugin-0x";
import type { Chain } from "viem";

export interface PluginLoadResult {
  plugins: unknown[];
  loadedTier0: string[];
  loadedTier1: string[];
  loadedTier2: string[];
  failedPlugins: Array<{ name: string; error: string }>;
}

export function loadPlugins(options: {
  hasWallet: boolean;
  zeroxApiKey?: string;
  coingeckoApiKey?: string;
}): PluginLoadResult {
  const result: PluginLoadResult = {
    plugins: [],
    loadedTier0: [],
    loadedTier1: [],
    loadedTier2: [],
    failedPlugins: [],
  };

  // Tier 0: Always loaded
  const tier0 = [
    { name: "erc20", factory: () => erc20({ tokens: [USDC, USDT, WETH, DAI] }) },
    { name: "erc721", factory: () => erc721() },
    { name: "ens", factory: () => ens() },
    { name: "dexscreener", factory: () => dexScreener() },
    { name: "coingecko", factory: () => coingecko(options.coingeckoApiKey ? { apiKey: options.coingeckoApiKey } : {}) },
  ];

  for (const { name, factory } of tier0) {
    try {
      result.plugins.push(factory());
      result.loadedTier0.push(name);
    } catch (e) {
      process.stderr.write(`[web3agent] GOAT plugin ${name} failed to load: ${e}\n`);
      result.failedPlugins.push({ name, error: String(e) });
    }
  }

  // Tier 1: Wallet required
  if (options.hasWallet) {
    const tier1 = [
      { name: "uniswap", factory: () => uniswap() },
      { name: "balancer", factory: () => balancer() },
    ];
    for (const { name, factory } of tier1) {
      try {
        result.plugins.push(factory());
        result.loadedTier1.push(name);
      } catch (e) {
        process.stderr.write(`[web3agent] GOAT plugin ${name} failed to load: ${e}\n`);
        result.failedPlugins.push({ name, error: String(e) });
      }
    }
  }

  // Tier 2: API key required
  if (options.zeroxApiKey) {
    try {
      result.plugins.push(zeroEx({ apiKey: options.zeroxApiKey }));
      result.loadedTier2.push("0x");
    } catch (e) {
      result.failedPlugins.push({ name: "0x", error: String(e) });
    }
  }

  return result;
}
```

Note: The actual GOAT plugin APIs may differ. Read the package source/docs to use the correct import paths. The above is approximate — adjust as needed.

### Chain availability matrix (embed in dispatch.ts)
```typescript
export const PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT: Record<string, number[]> = {
  uniswap: [1, 137, 43114, 8453, 10, 42161, 42220], // mainnet, polygon, avalanche, base, optimism, arbitrum, celo
  balancer: [34443, 8453, 137, 100, 42161, 43114, 10], // mode, base, polygon, gnosis, arbitrum, avalanche, optimism
  // Tier 0 plugins work on all chains
  erc20: [...SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS],
  erc721: [...SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS],
  ens: [...SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS],
  dexscreener: [...SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS],
  coingecko: [...SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS],
};
```

### src/goat/provider.ts
```typescript
import { getOnChainTools } from "@goat-sdk/adapter-model-context-protocol";
import { viem } from "@goat-sdk/wallet-viem";
import { generatePrivateKey, privateKeyToAccount } from "viem/accounts";
import { createWalletClientForChain } from "../config/wallet-factory.js";
import { getActiveAccount, getWalletState } from "../wallet/persistence.js";
import { loadPlugins } from "./plugins.js";
import { getAllChains } from "../chains/registry.js";

export interface GoatToolSnapshot {
  listOfTools: Array<{ name: string; description: string; inputSchema: object }>;
  toolHandler: (toolName: string, params: unknown) => Promise<unknown>;
  chainId: number;
}

export class GoatProvider {
  private snapshots = new Map<number, GoatToolSnapshot>();
  private pluginResult: ReturnType<typeof loadPlugins>;

  async initialize(config: {
    zeroxApiKey?: string;
    coingeckoApiKey?: string;
  }): Promise<void> {
    const walletState = getWalletState();
    const hasWallet = walletState.mode !== "read-only";
    
    this.pluginResult = loadPlugins({
      hasWallet,
      zeroxApiKey: config.zeroxApiKey,
      coingeckoApiKey: config.coingeckoApiKey,
    });

    // Create snapshots for each supported chain
    const chains = getAllChains();
    for (const chain of chains) {
      try {
        await this.buildSnapshot(chain.id);
      } catch (e) {
        process.stderr.write(`[web3agent] GOAT snapshot failed for chain ${chain.id}: ${e}\n`);
      }
    }
  }

  private async buildSnapshot(chainId: number): Promise<void> {
    // Use active account or ephemeral for read-only
    let account;
    const walletState = getWalletState();
    if (walletState.mode !== "read-only") {
      account = getActiveAccount();
    } else {
      // Ephemeral key for read-only mode (GOAT requires wallet)
      const ephemeralKey = generatePrivateKey();
      account = privateKeyToAccount(ephemeralKey);
    }
    
    const walletClient = createWalletClientForChain(account, chainId);
    const { listOfTools, toolHandler } = await getOnChainTools({
      wallet: viem(walletClient),
      plugins: this.pluginResult.plugins,
    });
    
    this.snapshots.set(chainId, { listOfTools, toolHandler, chainId });
  }

  getSnapshot(chainId: number): GoatToolSnapshot | undefined {
    return this.snapshots.get(chainId);
  }

  getAllToolNames(): string[] {
    // Union of all tool names across all chains (deduplicated)
    const names = new Set<string>();
    for (const [, snapshot] of this.snapshots) {
      for (const tool of snapshot.listOfTools) {
        names.add(tool.name);
      }
    }
    return [...names];
  }

  getLoadedPlugins(): string[] {
    return [
      ...this.pluginResult.loadedTier0,
      ...this.pluginResult.loadedTier1,
      ...this.pluginResult.loadedTier2,
    ];
  }
}

export const goatProvider = new GoatProvider();
```

### src/goat/dispatch.ts
```typescript
import type { CallToolResult } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js";
import { formatToolError } from "../utils/errors.js";
import { getConfig } from "../config/env.js";
import { goatProvider, type GoatToolSnapshot } from "./provider.js";
import { SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS } from "../chains/registry.js";

// Map of tool name → list of chain IDs where this tool is available
// (derived from plugin chain support matrix)
export const PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT: Record<string, number[]> = {
  // These are approximate — real values come from GOAT plugin capabilities
  // Uniswap-related tools
  uniswap_swap: [1, 137, 43114, 8453, 10, 42161, 42220],
  // Balancer-related tools  
  balancer_swap: [34443, 8453, 137, 100, 42161, 43114, 10],
};

export async function dispatchGoatTool(
  toolName: string,
  params: Record<string, unknown>
): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  const config = getConfig();
  const chainId = typeof params.chainId === "number" ? params.chainId : config.chainId;
  
  // Validate chain is supported
  if (!SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS.includes(chainId)) {
    return formatToolError(
      "UNSUPPORTED_CHAIN",
      `Chain ${chainId} is not supported. Supported chains: ${SUPPORTED_CHAIN_IDS.join(", ")}`,
    );
  }
  
  // Check plugin availability on this chain
  const pluginKey = Object.keys(PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT).find(k => toolName.startsWith(k.split("_")[0]));
  if (pluginKey && !PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT[pluginKey].includes(chainId)) {
    const availableChains = PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT[pluginKey];
    return formatToolError(
      "TOOL_UNAVAILABLE_ON_CHAIN",
      `${toolName} is not available on chain ${chainId}. Available on chains: ${availableChains.join(", ")}`,
      { availableChainIds: availableChains }
    );
  }
  
  const snapshot = goatProvider.getSnapshot(chainId);
  if (!snapshot) {
    return formatToolError("CHAIN_NOT_INITIALIZED", `No GOAT snapshot for chain ${chainId}`);
  }
  
  // Strip chainId from params before forwarding to GOAT
  const { chainId: _ignored, ...goatParams } = params;
  
  try {
    const result = await snapshot.toolHandler(toolName, goatParams);
    return result as CallToolResult;
  } catch (e) {
    return formatToolError("GOAT_TOOL_ERROR", String(e));
  }
}
```

### tests/goat/chain-aware-provider.test.ts
```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from "vitest";
import { GoatProvider } from "../../src/goat/provider.js";

// Mock GOAT adapter
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/adapter-model-context-protocol", () => ({
  getOnChainTools: vi.fn().mockImplementation(({ wallet }) => ({
    listOfTools: [
      { name: "get_balance", description: "Get balance", inputSchema: { type: "object" } },
    ],
    toolHandler: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async (name: string, params: unknown) => ({
      content: [{ type: "text", text: `called ${name} on chain ${(wallet as any).__chainId}` }],
    })),
  })),
}));

vi.mock("@goat-sdk/wallet-viem", () => ({
  viem: vi.fn().mockImplementation((client) => ({ ...client, __chainId: client.chain?.id })),
}));

vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-erc20", () => ({
  erc20: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({ name: "erc20" }),
  USDC: {}, USDT: {}, WETH: {}, DAI: {},
}));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-erc721", () => ({ erc721: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-ens", () => ({ ens: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-dexscreener", () => ({ dexScreener: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-coingecko", () => ({ coingecko: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-uniswap", () => ({ uniswap: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-balancer", () => ({ balancer: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));
vi.mock("@goat-sdk/plugin-0x", () => ({ zeroEx: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}) }));

describe("GoatProvider — chain-aware dispatch", () => {
  it("builds snapshot for different chains", async () => {
    const provider = new GoatProvider();
    await provider.initialize({});
    
    const snapshot8453 = provider.getSnapshot(8453);
    const snapshot1 = provider.getSnapshot(1);
    
    expect(snapshot8453).toBeDefined();
    expect(snapshot1).toBeDefined();
    expect(snapshot8453?.chainId).toBe(8453);
    expect(snapshot1?.chainId).toBe(1);
  });

  it("exposes tool names from all chains", async () => {
    const provider = new GoatProvider();
    await provider.initialize({});
    const names = provider.getAllToolNames();
    expect(names).toContain("get_balance");
  });
});
```

### tests/goat/chain-unavailable.test.ts
```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from "vitest";
import { dispatchGoatTool, PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT } from "../../src/goat/dispatch.js";

vi.mock("../../src/goat/provider.js", () => ({
  goatProvider: {
    getSnapshot: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({
      listOfTools: [],
      toolHandler: vi.fn(),
      chainId: 8453,
    }),
  },
}));

vi.mock("../../src/config/env.js", () => ({
  getConfig: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({ chainId: 8453 }),
}));

describe("dispatchGoatTool — chain unavailability", () => {
  it("returns structured error for unsupported chain", async () => {
    // Add a test entry to PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT
    PLUGIN_CHAIN_SUPPORT["uniswap_swap"] = [1, 137, 8453];
    
    const result = await dispatchGoatTool("uniswap_swap", { chainId: 59144 }); // Linea
    expect(result.isError).toBe(true);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    expect(parsed.error).toBe("TOOL_UNAVAILABLE_ON_CHAIN");
  });

  it("returns structured error for invalid chainId", async () => {
    const result = await dispatchGoatTool("get_balance", { chainId: 9999999 });
    expect(result.isError).toBe(true);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    expect(parsed.error).toBe("UNSUPPORTED_CHAIN");
  });
});
```

### Important: GOAT Plugin API Note
The actual plugin import paths may differ from the spec. Check the actual package exports:

If the APIs don't match what's specified, adapt while preserving the tier loading behavior. The important thing is the architecture works.

## 5. MUST NOT DO
- Do NOT expose raw GOAT schemas without the optional `chainId` parameter
- Do NOT assume every plugin supports every chain
- Do NOT crash startup if one plugin fails to init (wrap each in try/catch)
- Do NOT convert JSON Schema to Zod and back (GOAT already provides JSON Schema)
- Do NOT use npm — pnpm only

## 6. CONTEXT

### Notepad
- READ: `/Users/ignacioblitzer/Develop/defizoo/web3agent/.sisyphus/notepads/web3agent-framework/learnings.md`
- WRITE: Append to learnings.md

- Module resolution: `"nodenext"` — ALL src/ imports need `.js` extensions
- Installed: MCP SDK 1.27.1, viem 2.47.0, vitest 2.1.9, typescript 5.9.3, biome 1.9.4
- GOAT SDK version: `@goat-sdk/adapter-model-context-protocol@0.2.11`
- GOAT pins MCP SDK 1.0.4 — handled via peerDependencyRules (already set up in package.json)
- Wave 2 complete: `createWalletClientForChain`, `getActiveAccount`, `getWalletState`, `getConfig`, chain registry all ready
- Biome: no console.log — use process.stderr.write()
- GOAT requires wallet even for reads — use ephemeral key for read-only mode: `generatePrivateKey()` from `viem/accounts`

## 1. TASK
Task 8 of 11: Implement LI.FI cross-chain tools integrated with the framework wallet/confirmation model.

Working directory: `/Users/ignacioblitzer/Develop/defizoo/web3agent`

## 2. EXPECTED OUTCOME
- [ ] `src/lifi/config.ts` — LI.FI SDK configuration with wallet integration
- [ ] `src/tools/lifi/index.ts` — 3 tools: lifi_get_chains, lifi_get_quote, lifi_execute_bridge
- [ ] `tests/lifi/lifi-quote.test.ts` — trimmed quote response test

Verification:
```
pnpm test -- tests/lifi/lifi-quote.test.ts
pnpm test -- tests/lifi/lifi-confirmation.test.ts

```

## 3. REQUIRED TOOLS
- Bash: run commands in working directory
- Write: create new files
- Read: check existing files

## 4. MUST DO

### Read existing files first
- `src/config/wallet-factory.ts` — createWalletClientForChain
- `src/wallet/persistence.ts` — getActiveAccount, getWalletState
- `src/wallet/confirmation.ts` — ConfirmationQueueManager, confirmationQueue
- `src/types/tools.ts` — formatToolError, formatToolResponse, ToolDefinition
- `src/tools/register.ts` — ToolDefinition interface pattern

### src/lifi/config.ts
```typescript
import { createConfig, EVM } from "@lifi/sdk";
import { createWalletClientForChain } from "../config/wallet-factory.js";
import { getActiveAccount, getWalletState } from "../wallet/persistence.js";

let isConfigured = false;

export function initializeLifi(apiKey?: string): void {
  if (isConfigured) return;
  
  createConfig({
    integrator: "web3agent",
    ...(apiKey ? { apiKey } : {}),
    providers: [
      EVM({
        getWalletClient: async () => {
          const account = getActiveAccount();
          const walletState = getWalletState();
          // Return fresh wallet client for current default chain
          return createWalletClientForChain(account, walletState.chainId) as any;
        },
        switchChain: async (chainId: number) => {
          // MUST create fresh wallet client — never reuse across chains
          const account = getActiveAccount();
          return createWalletClientForChain(account, chainId) as any;
        },
      }),
    ],
  });
  
  isConfigured = true;
}
```

### src/tools/lifi/index.ts
Three MCP tools:

```typescript
import { getChains, getQuote, executeRoute, type Route, type Step } from "@lifi/sdk";
import { confirmationQueue } from "../../wallet/confirmation.js";
import { getWalletState } from "../../wallet/persistence.js";
import { formatToolError, formatToolResponse } from "../../utils/errors.js";
import type { ToolDefinition } from "../../tools/register.js";
import type { CallToolResult } from "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/types.js";
```

**Tool 1: lifi_get_chains** (always available)
```typescript
async function lifiGetChains(_params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  try {
    const chains = await getChains({});
    const summary = chains.map(c => ({
      id: c.id,
      name: c.name,
      nativeCurrency: c.nativeCurrency?.symbol,
    }));
    return formatToolResponse(summary);
  } catch (e) {
    return formatToolError("LIFI_ERROR", String(e));
  }
}
```

**Tool 2: lifi_get_quote** (always available, reads only)
```typescript
async function lifiGetQuote(params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  const { fromChainId, toChainId, fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress, fromAmount } = params;
  
  if (!fromChainId || !toChainId || !fromTokenAddress || !toTokenAddress || !fromAmount) {
    return formatToolError("MISSING_PARAMS", "Required: fromChainId, toChainId, fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress, fromAmount");
  }
  
  try {
    const walletState = getWalletState();
    const route = await getQuote({
      fromChain: fromChainId as string | number,
      toChain: toChainId as string | number,
      fromToken: fromTokenAddress as string,
      toToken: toTokenAddress as string,
      fromAmount: fromAmount as string,
      fromAddress: walletState.address ?? "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    });
    
    // Return TRIMMED summary only — never the full route object
    const trimmed = {
      fromChainId: route.action.fromChainId,
      toChainId: route.action.toChainId,
      fromToken: route.action.fromToken?.symbol,
      toToken: route.action.toToken?.symbol,
      fromAmount: route.action.fromAmount,
      fromAmountUSD: route.action.fromAmountUSD,
      toAmount: route.estimate?.toAmount,
      toAmountUSD: route.estimate?.toAmountUSD,
      toAmountMin: route.estimate?.toAmountMin,
      gasCostUSD: route.estimate?.gasCosts?.[0]?.amountUSD,
      estimatedDurationSeconds: route.estimate?.executionDuration,
      steps: route.steps?.map((s: Step) => ({
        type: s.type,
        tool: s.tool,
      })),
      tags: route.tags,
    };
    
    return formatToolResponse(trimmed);
  } catch (e) {
    return formatToolError("LIFI_QUOTE_ERROR", String(e));
  }
}
```

**Tool 3: lifi_execute_bridge** (write, confirmation-gated)
```typescript
async function lifiExecuteBridge(params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  const walletState = getWalletState();
  if (walletState.mode === "read-only") {
    return formatToolError("WALLET_REQUIRED", "Bridge execution requires an active wallet. Use wallet_activate first.");
  }
  
  // Get quote first to show summary
  const { fromChainId, toChainId, fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress, fromAmount } = params;
  
  if (!fromChainId || !toChainId || !fromTokenAddress || !toTokenAddress || !fromAmount) {
    return formatToolError("MISSING_PARAMS", "Required: fromChainId, toChainId, fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress, fromAmount");
  }
  
  // Check confirmation queue
  const enqueueResult = confirmationQueue.enqueue(
    "bridge",
    `Bridge ${fromAmount} from chain ${fromChainId} to chain ${toChainId}`,
    params
  );
  
  if (enqueueResult.queued) {
    return formatToolResponse({
      status: "queued",
      operationId: enqueueResult.id,
      summary: enqueueResult.summary,
      instruction: `Use transaction_confirm("${enqueueResult.id}") to execute the bridge.`,
    });
  }
  
  // If confirmation disabled, execute directly
  return _executeBridgeNow(params);
}

async function _executeBridgeNow(params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  try {
    const { fromChainId, toChainId, fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress, fromAmount } = params;
    const walletState = getWalletState();
    
    const route = await getQuote({
      fromChain: fromChainId as string | number,
      toChain: toChainId as string | number,
      fromToken: fromTokenAddress as string,
      toToken: toTokenAddress as string,
      fromAmount: fromAmount as string,
      fromAddress: walletState.address!,
    });
    
    await executeRoute(route, {
      updateRouteHook: (updatedRoute) => {
        const step = updatedRoute.steps?.[0];
        if (step?.execution) {
          process.stderr.write(`[web3agent] Bridge progress: ${JSON.stringify(step.execution.process)}\n`);
        }
      },
    });
    
    return formatToolResponse({
      status: "completed",
      message: "Bridge executed successfully",
    });
  } catch (e) {
    return formatToolError("BRIDGE_ERROR", String(e));
  }
}
```

### Export ToolDefinition array
```typescript
export function getLifiToolDefinitions(): ToolDefinition[] {
  return [
    {
      name: "lifi_get_chains",
      description: "Get list of chains supported by LI.FI for cross-chain bridging",
      inputSchema: { type: "object" as const, properties: {}, required: [] },
      handler: lifiGetChains,
    },
    {
      name: "lifi_get_quote",
      description: "Get a cross-chain bridge/swap quote from LI.FI",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          fromChainId: { type: "number", description: "Source chain ID" },
          toChainId: { type: "number", description: "Destination chain ID" },
          fromTokenAddress: { type: "string", description: "Source token address" },
          toTokenAddress: { type: "string", description: "Destination token address" },
          fromAmount: { type: "string", description: "Amount in wei" },
        },
        required: ["fromChainId", "toChainId", "fromTokenAddress", "toTokenAddress", "fromAmount"],
      },
      handler: lifiGetQuote,
    },
    {
      name: "lifi_execute_bridge",
      description: "Execute a cross-chain bridge (write operation, requires wallet and confirmation)",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          fromChainId: { type: "number" },
          toChainId: { type: "number" },
          fromTokenAddress: { type: "string" },
          toTokenAddress: { type: "string" },
          fromAmount: { type: "string" },
        },
        required: ["fromChainId", "toChainId", "fromTokenAddress", "toTokenAddress", "fromAmount"],
      },
      handler: lifiExecuteBridge,
    },
  ];
}
```

### tests/lifi/lifi-quote.test.ts
```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, vi } from "vitest";
import { getLifiToolDefinitions } from "../../src/tools/lifi/index.js";

vi.mock("@lifi/sdk", () => ({
  createConfig: vi.fn(),
  EVM: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}),
  getChains: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue([
    { id: 1, name: "Ethereum", nativeCurrency: { symbol: "ETH" } },
    { id: 8453, name: "Base", nativeCurrency: { symbol: "ETH" } },
  ]),
  getQuote: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({
    action: {
      fromChainId: 1,
      toChainId: 8453,
      fromToken: { symbol: "ETH" },
      toToken: { symbol: "ETH" },
      fromAmount: "1000000000000000000",
      fromAmountUSD: "3000",
    },
    estimate: {
      toAmount: "1000000000000000000",
      toAmountUSD: "2990",
      toAmountMin: "990000000000000000",
      executionDuration: 300,
      gasCosts: [{ amountUSD: "5" }],
    },
    steps: [{ type: "cross", tool: "connext" }],
    tags: ["FASTEST"],
  }),
  executeRoute: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),
}));

vi.mock("../../src/wallet/persistence.js", () => ({
  getWalletState: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({
    mode: "private-key",
    address: "0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890",
    chainId: 1,
  }),
  getActiveAccount: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}),
}));

describe("LI.FI tools", () => {
  it("lifi_get_chains returns list of chains", async () => {
    const tools = getLifiToolDefinitions();
    const getChainsTool = tools.find(t => t.name === "lifi_get_chains")!;
    const result = await getChainsTool.handler({});
    expect(result.isError).toBe(false);
    const chains = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    expect(chains.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(chains[0].id).toBeDefined();
  });

  it("lifi_get_quote returns trimmed summary", async () => {
    const tools = getLifiToolDefinitions();
    const quoteTool = tools.find(t => t.name === "lifi_get_quote")!;
    const result = await quoteTool.handler({
      fromChainId: 1,
      toChainId: 8453,
      fromTokenAddress: "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
      toTokenAddress: "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
      fromAmount: "1000000000000000000",
    });
    expect(result.isError).toBe(false);
    const quote = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    // Should have trimmed fields
    expect(quote.fromChainId).toBeDefined();
    expect(quote.toChainId).toBeDefined();
    expect(quote.toAmount).toBeDefined();
    // Should NOT have raw route structure
    expect(quote.action).toBeUndefined();
    expect(quote.transactionRequest).toBeUndefined();
  });
});
```

### tests/lifi/lifi-confirmation.test.ts

```typescript
import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from "vitest";

    steps: [],
    tags: [],
  }),

}));

vi.mock("../../src/wallet/persistence.js", () => ({

  }),

}));

// Override confirmation queue to be enabled
vi.mock("../../src/wallet/confirmation.js", async (importOriginal) => {
  const real = await importOriginal<typeof import("../../src/wallet/confirmation.js")>();
  return {
    ...real,
    confirmationQueue: new real.ConfirmationQueueManager(true),
  };
});

describe("lifi_execute_bridge — confirmation gating", () => {
  it("enqueues bridge operation instead of executing immediately", async () => {
    const tools = getLifiToolDefinitions();
    const bridgeTool = tools.find(t => t.name === "lifi_execute_bridge")!;
    const result = await bridgeTool.handler({
      fromChainId: 1,
      toChainId: 8453,
      fromTokenAddress: "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
      toTokenAddress: "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
      fromAmount: "1000000000000000000",
    });
    expect(result.isError).toBe(false);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    expect(parsed.status).toBe("queued");
    expect(parsed.operationId).toBeTruthy();
  });
});
```

### src/orbs/chains.ts
```typescript
// Chain availability for each Orbs product
// Liquidity Hub: Polygon (137), BSC (56), Base (8453), Linea (59144), Blast (81457), Arbitrum (42161)
// dTWAP/dLIMIT: broader — Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, BSC, and others per SDK configs

export const LIQUIDITY_HUB_CHAINS = [137, 56, 8453, 59144, 81457, 42161];

// dTWAP chains depend on SDK configs — use a conservative set
export const TWAP_CHAINS = [1, 137, 42161, 8453, 56, 59144, 324]; // mainnet, polygon, arbitrum, base, bsc, linea, zksync

export function isLiquidityHubSupported(chainId: number): boolean {
  return LIQUIDITY_HUB_CHAINS.includes(chainId);
}

export function isTwapSupported(chainId: number): boolean {
  return TWAP_CHAINS.includes(chainId);
}

export function getLiquidityHubError(chainId: number): string {
  return `Orbs Liquidity Hub is not available on chain ${chainId}. Available on chains: ${LIQUIDITY_HUB_CHAINS.join(", ")} (Polygon, BSC, Base, Linea, Blast, Arbitrum)`;
}
```

### src/orbs/liquidity-hub.ts
Use the actual `@orbs-network/liquidity-hub-sdk` API. Based on research:
```typescript
import { constructSDK } from "@orbs-network/liquidity-hub-sdk";
```

Create per-chain SDK instances:
```typescript
const sdkCache = new Map<number, ReturnType<typeof constructSDK>>();

function getSdk(chainId: number) {
  if (!sdkCache.has(chainId)) {
    sdkCache.set(chainId, constructSDK({ partner: "web3agent", chainId }));
  }
  return sdkCache.get(chainId)!;
}
```

Tools:
- **orbs_get_quote**: Read-only, no wallet needed. Call `sdk.getQuote({ fromToken, toToken, inAmount, slippage? })`. Return trimmed: `{ inToken, outToken, inAmount, outAmount, minAmountOut, exchange }`. Chain-gated.
- **orbs_swap**: Write, confirmation-gated, wallet required. Flow: quote → sign EIP-712 → `sdk.swap(quote, signature)`.

For swap signing:
```typescript
// EIP-712 signing of the quote data
const account = getActiveAccount();
// quote contains permitData that needs signing
const signature = await account.signTypedData(quote.permitData);
await sdk.swap(quote, signature);
```

### src/orbs/twap.ts
Use `@orbs-network/twap-sdk` (version 5.x):
```typescript
import { constructSDK } from "@orbs-network/twap-sdk";
```

**IMPORTANT**: First inspect the actual v5.x API since the spec mentions v2.7.29 but v5.x is installed. Check actual exports with the bash command above.

Approximate tool implementations:
- **orbs_place_twap**: Confirmation-gated. Use `twapSDK.derivedSwapValues()` → `twapSDK.prepareOrderArgs()` → create pending operation
- **orbs_place_limit**: Same as TWAP but `chunks=1` with non-zero `dstMinAmount`
- **orbs_list_orders**: Read-only, wallet required. Use `twapSDK.getOrders(account)` if available, or Lens contract

### src/orbs/dsltp.ts

```typescript
// dSLTP FEATURE GATE
// Validate whether a dSLTP SDK is available
function validateDsltpSdk(): boolean {
  try {
    // Check if liquidity-hub-sdk exports stop-loss/take-profit functions
    // At time of planning, these were NOT validated
    return false; // Default: not validated
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

export const DSLTP_AVAILABLE = validateDsltpSdk();

// If DSLTP_AVAILABLE is false, this file exports nothing useful
// server_status will report: { dsltp: "unavailable — SDK not validated" }
export function getDsltpToolDefinitions() {
  if (!DSLTP_AVAILABLE) return []; // No tools
  // If validated in the future, implement here
  return [];
}
```

```typescript
import { formatToolError, formatToolResponse } from "../../utils/errors.js";

import type { ToolDefinition } from "../../tools/register.js";

// ... implement tool handler functions ...

export function getOrbsToolDefinitions(): ToolDefinition[] {
  const tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
    // orbs_get_quote — always available (read-only)
    {
      name: "orbs_get_quote",
      description: "Get a quote from Orbs Liquidity Hub for same-chain aggregated swap",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          chainId: { type: "number", description: "Chain ID (supported: 137, 56, 8453, 59144, 81457, 42161)" },
          fromToken: { type: "string", description: "Source token address" },
          toToken: { type: "string", description: "Destination token address" },
          inAmount: { type: "string", description: "Input amount in wei" },
          slippage: { type: "number", description: "Slippage tolerance (0.5 = 0.5%)" },
        },
        required: ["chainId", "fromToken", "toToken", "inAmount"],
      },
      handler: orbsGetQuote,
    },
    // orbs_swap
    {
      name: "orbs_swap",
      description: "Execute a same-chain swap via Orbs Liquidity Hub (write, confirmation-gated)",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          chainId: { type: "number" },
          fromToken: { type: "string" },
          toToken: { type: "string" },
          inAmount: { type: "string" },
          slippage: { type: "number" },
        },
        required: ["chainId", "fromToken", "toToken", "inAmount"],
      },
      handler: orbsSwap,
    },
    // TWAP tools
    {
      name: "orbs_place_twap",
      description: "Place a dTWAP (time-weighted average price) order (write, confirmation-gated)",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          chainId: { type: "number" },
          srcToken: { type: "string" },
          dstToken: { type: "string" },
          srcAmount: { type: "string", description: "Total amount to swap in wei" },
          chunks: { type: "number", description: "Number of equal chunks" },
          fillDelay: { type: "number", description: "Delay between fills in seconds" },
        },
        required: ["chainId", "srcToken", "dstToken", "srcAmount", "chunks", "fillDelay"],
      },
      handler: orbsPlaceTwap,
    },
    {
      name: "orbs_place_limit",
      description: "Place a dLIMIT order (write, confirmation-gated)",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          chainId: { type: "number" },
          srcToken: { type: "string" },
          dstToken: { type: "string" },
          srcAmount: { type: "string" },
          dstMinAmount: { type: "string", description: "Minimum output amount (the limit price)" },
          expiry: { type: "number", description: "Order expiry in seconds from now" },
        },
        required: ["chainId", "srcToken", "dstToken", "srcAmount", "dstMinAmount"],
      },
      handler: orbsPlaceLimit,
    },
    {
      name: "orbs_list_orders",
      description: "List open TWAP/dLIMIT orders for active wallet",
      inputSchema: {
        type: "object" as const,
        properties: {
          chainId: { type: "number" },
        },
        required: ["chainId"],
      },
      handler: orbsListOrders,
    },
    // dSLTP tools (only if validated)
    ...getDsltpToolDefinitions(),
  ];
  
  return tools;
}
```

### Handler implementations (approximate — adapt to actual SDK)

```typescript
async function orbsGetQuote(params: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<CallToolResult> {
  const chainId = Number(params.chainId ?? getConfig().chainId);
  
  if (!isLiquidityHubSupported(chainId)) {
    return formatToolError("CHAIN_NOT_SUPPORTED", getLiquidityHubError(chainId));
  }
  
  try {
    const { getSdk } = await import("../../orbs/liquidity-hub.js");
    const sdk = getSdk(chainId);
    const quote = await sdk.getQuote({
      fromToken: params.fromToken as string,
      toToken: params.toToken as string,
      inAmount: params.inAmount as string,
      slippage: (params.slippage as number) ?? 0.5,
    });
    
    return formatToolResponse({
      inToken: params.fromToken,
      outToken: params.toToken,
      inAmount: quote.inAmount ?? params.inAmount,
      outAmount: quote.outAmount,
      minAmountOut: quote.minAmountOut,
      exchange: quote.exchange,
    });
  } catch (e) {
    return formatToolError("ORBS_QUOTE_ERROR", String(e));
  }
}
```

```typescript
}));

  getActiveAccount: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({}),
}));

describe("Orbs tools", () => {
  it("orbs_get_quote succeeds on supported chain (Base 8453)", async () => {
    const tools = getOrbsToolDefinitions();
    const quoteTool = tools.find(t => t.name === "orbs_get_quote")!;
    const result = await quoteTool.handler({
      chainId: 8453,
      fromToken: "0x0",
      toToken: "0x1",
      inAmount: "1000000000000000000",
    });
    expect(result.isError).toBe(false);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);

  it("orbs_get_quote returns structured error on unsupported chain (Ethereum mainnet 1)", async () => {
    const tools = getOrbsToolDefinitions();
    const quoteTool = tools.find(t => t.name === "orbs_get_quote")!;
    const result = await quoteTool.handler({
      chainId: 1, // Ethereum — not supported by Liquidity Hub
      fromToken: "0x0",
      toToken: "0x1",
      inAmount: "1000000000000000000",
    });
    expect(result.isError).toBe(true);
    const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text as string);
    expect(parsed.error).toBe("CHAIN_NOT_SUPPORTED");
  });
});
```
